notes: layered-lite: index.ts is a small public entrypoint that delegates Pi registration to src/pi/register.ts while root types.ts remains the shared cross-layer contract.

Pi-facing adapter/register glue lives under src/pi/: adapter.ts owns /pi-hud command parsing, harness event mapping, and HUD refresh side effects; register.ts owns extension registration orchestration.

App orchestration lives under src/app/: snapshot.ts assembles HUD data, state.ts owns app state/config/timers/usage aggregation, and git-status.ts shells out before delegating porcelain/upstream normalization to src/domain/git-status.ts.
Domain logic lives under src/domain/: git-status.ts owns pure git porcelain/upstream normalization.

UI rendering lives under src/ui/: components own HUD renderers, surfaces own footer/modal output, and lib/format.ts owns ANSI-aware formatting helpers. Mixed state reads in tools/worktime/footer/modal are intentionally deferred layered-lite seams.
